body:
A step towards #3594.

This PR adds LazyBroadcast as a dependency, to help prevent #3540 from becoming stale.
title: A LazyBroadcast as a dependency

body:

## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14

It seems the global average value is between 20-30. For now I use 25x2 = 50, and I multiply it by 2 because it seems RRTMGP ice optics is taking diameter rather than radius. We are going to change this soon.

title: use a more realistic cloud ice effective radius
